intro: Heat shimmers off the cracked flats. A lone figure stands in your path, hand hovering, and the only sound is the wind.
speaker: Outlaw
introDialogue: You and me, stranger. One draw. We both put up {{ante}}, and the fastest hand walks away with the lot. My draw clocks {{outlawSpeed}} Speed - bring something quicker. Pick your partner... if you've got the nerve.
title: High Noon
description: An outlaw calls you out for a single-strike duel. You each ante {{ante}}. Its draw clocks {{outlawSpeed}} Speed. Pick ONE Pokemon: if that mon's Speed is at least {{outlawSpeed}} it strikes first and you take the whole pot - otherwise your ante is gone. Only the mon you pick is compared. Or walk away.
invalidSelection: That Pokemon is in no shape to draw.

1.label: Take the duel
1.tooltip:
(+) Pick your FASTEST mon to win 2x your ante
(?) Too slow and you lose your ante
1.selected: You step into the flats and square off...

2.label: Walk away
2.selected: You tip your hat and back away. The outlaw lets you go.

win: Your Pokemon draws first! The outlaw freezes, beaten, and tosses you the pot with a grudging nod.
lose: Too slow - the outlaw's draw lands first. You forfeit your ante and trudge on.
